reasoning:
The daily average temperature at Lyon–Saint Exupéry Airport on 2025-10-26 was exactly 9.575°C (having dropped sharply from 17.01°C on Oct 22). To determine the probability that the daily average temperature will exceed 9.575°C on the three resolution dates, we rely on historical climatology for Lyon and adjust for variance and warming trends. 

1. **2025-11-02:** The normal average daily temperature for early November in Lyon is approximately 10-11°C. Given a standard deviation of about 3-4°C, a return to seasonal norms after the late-October cold snap makes it more likely than not that the temperature will exceed 9.575°C. Extrapolating a normal distribution yields an ~55-60% probability.
2. **2025-11-25:** By late November, the climatological mean drops to approximately 6-7°C. While mild days can certainly occur (standard deviations around 4°C), exceeding 9.5°C requires a day in the upper ~20-30% of the natural distribution for that time of year.
3. **2026-01-24:** January is typically the coldest month in Lyon, with an average daily temperature hovering around 3.5-4°C. Achieving a daily mean above 9.575°C requires an unusually warm winter day (e.g., strong south-westerly warm fronts). Although global warming trends make such days slightly more frequent, the statistical likelihood remains quite low, around 10-20%.
batch_queries: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Lyon–Saint Exupéry Airport will be higher on each resolution date listed below than on 2025-10-26?
